# FractalPark

> Fractal art exploration website with real-time GPU rendering

## Overview

FractalPark is a web-based fractal art generator that runs entirely in the browser using WebGL. It enables users to explore, create, save, and share mathematical fractal art without installation or backend processing.

## Pages

- [Home](https://fractalpark.com/en): Featured fractal gallery and entry point
- [Explore](https://fractalpark.com/en/explore): Interactive fractal renderer with 94 formulas, real-time controls, URL sharing, and export
- [Gallery](https://fractalpark.com/en/gallery): Featured presets and personal collection manager
- [About](https://fractalpark.com/en/about): Project information and technology stack

## Core Features

- **94 Built-in Formulas**: Mandelbrot, Julia, Burning Ship, Tricorn, Phoenix, Newton, Magnet, Lambda, McMullen, rational, transcendental, and more
- **7 Transform Plugins**: Kaleidoscope, Mobius, Inversion, Polar, Sinusoidal, Spherical, None
- **Custom Formula Editor**: Write fractal formulas using Fractint-style .frm compatibility and FractalPark native directives with real-time compilation
- **Coloring System**: 9 coloring modes with orbit channel support
- **Real-time Rendering**: WebGL GPU acceleration with SSAA options
- **High-res Export**: PNG export with tiled rendering for large images
- **Personal Gallery**: Save fractals to localStorage with thumbnails and starred favorites
- **Bilingual**: English and Chinese support

## URL Parameters

Fractal state is URL-serializable. The live schema uses compact keys from `src/lib/url-params.ts`.

Core view:
- `cx`, `cy`: center coordinates
- `z`: zoom level
- `rot`: rotation in radians
- `iter`: max iterations

Formula and Julia:
- `fm`: formula ID or short key (`m`, `bs`, `tr`, `ph`; omitted means Mandelbrot)
- `julia`: `1` or `0`
- `jre`, `jim`: Julia constant real/imaginary parts
- `pow`: power for formulas that support it

Color and render:
- `pal`: palette index
- `oc`: outside coloring (`sm`, `ot`, `st`, `bi`, `ti` or full plugin ID)
- `ic`: inside coloring (`bk`, `fo`, `ad` or full plugin ID)
- `grad`: custom gradient stops as `position:hex,position:hex`
- `ssaa`: `1` enables SSAA
- `ait`: `1` enables adaptive iterations

Transforms, lighting, and animation:
- `tr`: transform plugin ID
- `pp`: plugin parameters as `name:value,name:value`
- `ots`, `otx`, `oty`, `otr`, `otw`: orbit trap shape/position/radius/width
- `lg`, `lgm`, `lga`, `lge`, `lgi`: lighting controls
- `kf`: keyframes as `cx,cy,z,rot|cx,cy,z,rot`

Example:
https://fractalpark.com/en/explore?cx=-0.5&cy=0.25&z=12.50&fm=burningShip&oc=st&julia=1&jre=-0.620000&jim=0.410000&pal=1

Full documentation: https://fractalpark.com/llms-full.txt
